critic_notes: Five questions on Kosten- und Aufwandsschätzung (section 9.2). All correct answers well-supported by source. Question 003 (difficulty 'experte') is borderline -- it is a single direct quote from the source, not requiring synthesis, so 'basis' or 'fortgeschritten' might be more appropriate, but the nuance about Basis-Anforderungen being non-negotiable does require careful reading. Quotes verified clean. Topic 'methodik' correct. Schema and pages correct.

issues.detail: Labeled 'experte' but the answer is a direct one-sentence quote from the source ('Basis-Anforderungen müssen im Normalfall immer erfüllt werden, die Akzeptanz eines Restrisikos ist aufgrund ihrer elementaren Natur nicht vorgesehen'). This is closer to 'basis' or 'fortgeschritten' difficulty.
